sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
OK so the center is:
```
WWgggg
WWgggg
WWRRWW
WWRRWW
WWgggg
WWgggg
```
Decoding as 3x3 (each cell 2x2 pixels), with W→red, g→blue, R→center:
Row 0: W(44-45)→R, g(46-47)→b, g(48-49)→b  → R b b
Row 1: W(44-45)→R, R(46-47)→center, W(48-49)→R  → R ? R
Row 2: W(44-45)→R, g(46-47)→b, g(48-49)→b  → R b b
So the encoded target is: Rbb/R.R/Rbb
Current framed grid: bRb/R.b/bRR
To match Rbb/R.R/Rbb:
- (0,0): b→R: click (38, 38)
- (0,1): R→b: click (38, 46)
- (0,2): b→b: same
- (1,0): R→R: same
- (1,2): b→R: click (46, 54)
- (2,0): b→R: click (54, 38)
- (2,1): R→b: click (54, 46)
- (2,2): R→b: click (54, 54)
That's 6 clicks. Let me try this!

])
